title: festuca ovina var. aristata
intro: Festuca ovina var. aristata, also known as aristate fescue or sheep's fescue, is a type of perennial grass found in mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Festuca ovina var. aristata include relief from respiratory issues, wound healing, and antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its essential oil is also used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits.
